scenarios.title: One real analysis produces a finding object
scenarios.description: Session 1 of the demo. The researcher asks whether high cytotoxic T-cell infiltration is associated with better overall survival in LUAD; the agent actually runs it and gets a real number.
preconditions: The TCGA LUAD slice is cached on disk
steps: Score patients on the cytotoxic signature and split high vs low
Fit Kaplan-Meier with a log-rank test and a Cox model
expected: HR, 95% CI, p, and n per arm are reported
The result states whether it is univariate or stage-adjusted
The finding object is accepted by the write path unedited

scenarios.title: The analysis runs with the network off
scenarios.description: The analysis must not depend on cBioPortal being reachable at 16:00 on demo day.
preconditions: The slice has been fetched once and cached
expected: The analysis completes and returns the same numbers
